title: A Ghost Ship and a Living Skeleton: Key Exchange
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Brook, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #14 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Brook, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's good, but... what's with this sea?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: The fog's so thick, it's eerily dark.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: OH!? We've already arrived at Mermaid Island!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: No, that sea where monsters appear!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Eh... Mo... Mons... Mom- Nuh-Nuh... Mons...

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: USOP, GIMME SOME OF THOSE TOOO ~~!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: A sailor's Deity of the Damned !!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Is there someone riding in it...?

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Brook, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of a ghost ship and a living skeleton: key exchange.
